summary: Renovate Bot patch bump of @uiw/codemirror-theme-github from ^4.25.4 to ^4.25.7 in @mastra/playground-ui. Changes are lockfile-only (pnpm-lock.yaml) plus a changeset. Upstream releases include bug fixes for unused imports, explicit dependency declarations, hyperlink trailing slash fix, and a package publish failure fix.
maintainerNotes: PR has merge conflicts (CONFLICTING state) and needs a rebase. CI shows failures in 'Full Test Suite' and 'Observability Package Tests' which appear unrelated to this dependency change. Only github-actions bot has approved — no human review. The Renovate description notes the installed version resolved to 4.25.8 (beyond the requested ^4.25.7 range target). Tick the rebase checkbox in the PR description or manually rebase to resolve conflicts, then verify CI passes.
